title: No Structures
description: Removes all vanilla structures, including the stronghold.
body: Removes all vanilla structures from the game. This does mean that there are no vanilla survival means to enter the end, or get blaze rods, shulkers, etc. You can find other mods to bring these features back, but thats not the purpose of this mod; all it wants is to remove those pesky structures, without breaking anything! (hopefully...)
